summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OrthoConnect new features. All requested features are working correctly: AgileOrtho branding in header/footer, About page shows only B. Nagi Reddy in Advisory Board, max 2 subspecialties limit enforced in both frontend and backend, and real OTP is sent via 2Factor.in integration.
passed_tests: Header branding - Logo shows 'A' with teal gradient, 'OrthoConnect' title, 'An initiative of AgileOrtho' tagline
Footer branding - Shows 'OrthoConnect' with 'An initiative of AgileOrtho' and '© 2026 OrthoConnect by AgileOrtho'
About page - Advisory Board section shows only B. Nagi Reddy (Director - Finance & Legal)
About page - Dr. Harsha, Dr. Madhav, Dr. Deepthi correctly removed
About page - Title changed from 'Leadership Team' to 'Advisory Board'
Subspecialty limit - Frontend shows '0/2 selected' counter
Subspecialty limit - Frontend disables checkboxes after 2 are selected (verified with Shoulder + Knee)
Subspecialty limit - Backend rejects 3 subspecialties with 400 error 'Maximum 2 subspecialties allowed'
Subspecialty limit - Backend accepts 2 subspecialties (200 OK)
Subspecialty limit - Backend accepts 1 subspecialty (200 OK)
OTP via 2Factor.in - Real SMS sent for valid Indian mobile numbers (confirmed in backend logs)
OTP via 2Factor.in - Fallback to mocked OTP for invalid numbers (for testing)
OTP verification - Wrong code returns 401 Unauthorized
Doctor profile page - WhatsApp, Call Clinic, Visit Website buttons all present

success_rate.backend: 100% (all API tests passed, subspecialty validation working)

seed_data_creation: Test surgeon profiles created during subspecialty limit testing

features_verified.agileortho_branding_header: ✅ Logo 'A' with teal gradient, 'OrthoConnect' title, 'An initiative of AgileOrtho' tagline
features_verified.agileortho_branding_footer: ✅ 'OrthoConnect' with 'An initiative of AgileOrtho' and copyright text
features_verified.about_page_advisory_board: ✅ Only B. Nagi Reddy shown (Dr. Harsha, Dr. Madhav, Dr. Deepthi removed)
features_verified.subspecialty_limit_frontend: ✅ Counter shows X/2 selected, checkboxes disable after 2 selections
features_verified.otp_2factor_integration: ✅ Real SMS sent via 2Factor.in (confirmed in backend logs: 'OTP sent successfully to ****** via 2Factor.in')
features_verified.doctor_profile_buttons: ✅ WhatsApp, Call Clinic, Visit Website buttons all working

otp_integration_notes.real_sms: OTP is sent via 2Factor.in for valid 10-digit Indian mobile numbers
otp_integration_notes.fallback: For invalid numbers (e.g., 1234567890), mocked OTP is returned in response for testing
otp_integration_notes.backend_logs: Successful SMS sends logged as 'OTP sent successfully to ******XXXX via 2Factor.in'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified and working. Real OTP is now sent via 2Factor.in - check backend logs for 'OTP sent successfully' messages. Subspecialty limit (max 2) enforced in both frontend (checkboxes disable) and backend (400 error). About page now shows 'Advisory Board' with only B. Nagi Reddy. AgileOrtho branding present in header and footer.
